title: petra #4073
definition:
1) a rock, cliff or ledge
    1a) a projecting rock, crag, rocky ground
    1b) a rock, a large stone
    1c) metaph. a man like a rock, by reason of his firmness and
        strength of soul
nasbUsage:

    1a) a projecting rock, crag, rocky ground
